summary: Comprehensive backend pytest (28 tests, 100% pass) + Playwright frontend smoke covering auth, listings, KYC, smart-match, chat, websocket, payments/escrow, refunds, reviews, notifications, device validation, admin, and frontend nav/pages.

minor.issue: Email validation rejects RFC-reserved TLDs (.test, .invalid). Not user-facing but worth noting if integration tests use those.

ui_bugs.issue: No data-testid attribute on product cards. Tested selector `[data-testid^="product-card"]` returns 0 matches even though 8 listings render. Add data-testid="product-card-{id}" to enable robust testing.

Sign-in button is not `type="submit"`. Playwright `button[type='submit']` selector fails; only role/text works. Pressing Enter inside fields may also not submit. Recommend wrapping inputs in a <form onSubmit> with type=submit button.

action_items: Add data-testid attribute to ProductCard component (recommended: data-testid="product-card" or product-card-{id})
Login.jsx: make the Sign in button type='submit' inside a <form> for better UX/accessibility/testability
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1068 lines — consider splitting into modules (auth, listings, chat, payments, admin) for maintainability.
Plain-text passwords + token=user_id are intentional per user request (university demo); do NOT ship to production.
Listings/match endpoints call enrich_listing per item which triggers multiple Mongo round-trips (seller fetch, payments count, reviews aggregate). For larger datasets, batch with $lookup/aggregation.
WebSocket /api/ws/chat/{user_id} has NO auth — any user_id can subscribe to anyone's stream. For demo OK but flag it.
Pydantic model for PATCH /listings accepts `body: dict` (no validation) — use a model.
compute_trust_score recomputed on every list call — cache or store on user doc.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (login, dashboard, wallet, profile, admin, KYC redirect verified; product-card testid missing)

test_credentials: From /app/memory/test_credentials.md — used aria@g2g.app/demo1234, admin@g2g.app/admin123, kenji@g2g.app/demo1234, store@techhub.sg/demo1234. All work.
seed_data_creation: Tests created several TEST_*@example.com signups and a few TEST_ prefixed listings via API. They are not auto-cleaned but use TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers full surface area (auth, listings, KYC, match, chat REST+WS, payments, refunds, reviews, notifications, device validation, admin). All pass against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend: use button text 'Sign in' (NOT button[type=submit]) for login. Sidebar testids: sidebar-{dashboard|buy|sell|match|valuation|chat|wallet|validation|verification|notifications}. Header testids: brand-logo, global-search-input, theme-toggle, header-notifications-btn, header-user-menu. ProductCard has NO data-testid — use other selectors or ask main agent to add.
